title: ECJ Rules Hungary's Orbán-Era LGBTQ Law Violates Human Rights
detail: The European Court of Justice ruled that Hungary's Orbán-era law restricting LGBTQ content and representation infringes on fundamental human rights. The ruling adds significant legal pressure on Magyar's incoming government as it prepares to take shape, forcing an early decision on whether to comply with EU human rights standards or continue challenging Brussels.

media.caption: ECJ rules Hungary's Orbán-era LGBTQ law infringes on human rights
